caption: A person wearing a navy blue uniform, a navy blue baseball cap, and a red life vest stands on a concrete dock next to a large grey ship. They are holding and manipulating a thick, white mooring rope that is partially coiled on the ground. In the initial frames, the person is leaning forward and gripping the rope with both hands, pulling it across the concrete surface. As the sequence progresses, they shift their weight and continue to handle the rope, guiding it toward the edge of the dock. The background shows the smooth, grey hull of the ship and a dark body of water. The concrete edge of the dock is marked with a yellow stripe. There is no on-screen text or logos visible. The action is a continuous motion of the individual managing the heavy rope against the backdrop of the ship and harbor.
